## Changelog

### New features

- _Stats_ allows you to send metrics, such as the number of startups, logins and launches, with some extra information, to the EML AdminTool. The EML AdminTool routes that allows users to push stats is rate limited to 1 handshake every 10 minutes, and 10 stats every 10 minutes.
- _Crash Reports_ allow your users to report crashes directly from the launcher to the EML AdminTool. The routes that allows users to push crash reports is rate limited to 1 handshake every 30 minutes, 2 crash reports every hour, and 4 crash reports every 24 hours.

### Changes

- Added a `launch_crash` event to the `Launcher` class so that you can listen to when a crash report is sent to the EML AdminTool.
- Added some events to the `*Auth` and `Bootstrap` classes so the `Stats` class can listen to them and send them to the EML AdminTool.

### Bug fixes and improvements

- Updated dependencies to the latest versions.
